debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i < j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  -- unfold the matrix entry to a coordinate projection on the product space
  have h_eq :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j)
        = fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h)]
  -- use the `HasLaw` of coordinate projections under the product measure
  refine (h_eq ▸ ?_)
  have hdist : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, (ne_of_lt h)]
  simpa [WignerMeasure, hdist] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
